title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple rebuilt Siri at WWDC 2026 with personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, and cross-device integration. The new Siri is reportedly powered by Google Gemini, faces EU regulatory delays, and received a mixed market response with Apple shares falling after the keynote.
writeup: This video covers Apple's overhaul of Siri at WWDC 2026, adding personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, and cross-device integration. It reports that the rebuilt assistant is powered by Google Gemini, a notable shift given Apple's earlier in-house Apple Intelligence efforts. Key takeaways: the rollout faces EU regulatory delays, and the market response was mixed, with Apple shares falling after the keynote.
